JUDGE BENSON, LGARBER, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT KELLY KRANTZ. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD. TRIAL DATE OF 10/10/95 TO STAND FOR ATTYS TO OBTAIN THE SIGNATURES OF ALL DEFTS IN THE SETTLEMENT OF THIS CASE.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRCHNER, KEITH L. KRANTZ, KELLY ANDERSON, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 767 HAIGHT, STAYED UNTIL NOV-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 9:00AM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF KEEPS SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS. JDMT AGAINST ANDERSON & KRANTZ PER STIP & AGAINST KIRCHNER AFTER DEFAULT.
